reviews.comment:
La verdad que esta bastante mal cuidada, pero es la única opción en Cachi

(Translated by Google)
It's actually quite poorly maintained, but it's the only option in Cachi.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSd0pDeml3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Vistas únicas! Si estas en el lugar en Abril, vas a poder observar a la distancia la imagen emblemática de los secadero de pimientos, tan característicos. Y si estás de paseo en las horas de la noche, la vista a la ciudad desde esa altura, será descubrir una ciudad llena de puntos brillantes.

(Translated by Google)
Unique views! If you're there in April, you'll be able to see the iconic image of the pepper drying sheds in the distance. And if you're strolling around at night, the view of the city from that height will reveal a city full of twinkling lights.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSNzVPUGlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Creo que es el único lugar para repostar el vehículo antes de seguir viaje por la 40, el servicio es bueno y tiene una tienda y baños básicos, que para el lugar donde se encuentra, es un lujo.

(Translated by Google)
I think it's the only place to refuel the vehicle before continuing the journey on Route 40. The service is good, and it has a store and basic restrooms, which, given its location, is a luxury.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSeDhicEJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los muchachos!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent attention from the boys!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSMi1xcVJREAE

reviews.comment:
La atención es buena, cordial y se puede pagar con la app de YPF para sumar puntos.
Suele haber bastante cola de autos, por lo que conviene evitar los horarios pico y cargar por ejemplo a la noche.
No les funciona, dicen que hace largo tiempo, el compresor para inflar las gomas. El aparato está desmantelado.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good and friendly, and you can pay with the YPF app to earn points. There's usually quite a line of cars, so it's best to avoid peak hours and fill up at night, for example. Their tire inflator hasn't been working for a long time, they say. The machine is dismantled.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNScS1UcG9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Basica pero con lo necesario... Excelente atención. Justo llegué cuando llenaban los tanques de la estación, asi que tuve demora .. pero excelente atencion

(Translated by Google)
Basic but with everything you need... Excellent service. I arrived just as they were filling the station's tanks, so there was a delay... but excellent service.
